[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001000101 3
1 101001110 5
2 011110011 6
3 010101101 5
4 011110110 6
5 111010101 6
6 110010001 4
7 111001100 5

01 10 111111011 8
12 21 101001010 4
23 32 111000111 6
34 43 110010101 5
45 54 111011100 6
56 65 111111111 a
67 76 010111111 7
70 07 111110011 7

02 20 111110011 7
13 31 110001101 5
24 42 101010010 4
35 53 111001101 6
46 64 110111111 8
57 75 111111110 8
60 06 111111111 a
71 17 110111010 6

03 30 111110111 8
14 41 100011000 3
25 52 111001110 6
36 63 110111111 8
47 74 110110010 5
50 05 111111111 a
61 16 110111111 8
72 27 111110010 6

04 40 111110011 7
15 51 111001100 5 match 7
26 62 111111111 a
37 73 110110111 7
